user.title: Step Challenge
user.description:
Set up your Step Challenge. You will add participants in the next steps.

The integration automatically creates a daily automation and a race panel in the sidebar.

data_description.record_time: Time at which the daily stage winner is determined. Choose a time when all devices have finished syncing their steps – recommended: 22:00–23:00.

data_description.step_entity: Select the step sensor from the list. Look for a sensor with "daily_steps" in its name.

add_more.title: Add Another Participant?
add_more.description:

At least {min} participants are required.
